result.stdout:
Description:
  This .NET tool allows you to validate and compare protocol solutions.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator [command] [options]

Options:
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  --version                                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  validate  Validates a DataMiner solution.
  compare   Compares a DataMiner solution with the previous version.

commands.payload:
Description:
  This .NET tool allows you to validate and compare protocol solutions.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator [command] [options]

Options:
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  --version                                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  validate  Validates a DataMiner solution.
  compare   Compares a DataMiner solution with the previous version.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compares a DataMiner solution with the previous version.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator compare [command] [options]

Options:
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:

commands.payload:
Description:
  Compares a DataMiner solution with the previous version.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator compare [command] [options]

Options:
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  protocol-solution  Compare a protocol solution with the previous version.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare a protocol solution with the previous version.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator compare protocol-solution [options]

Options:
  -sp, --solution-path <solution-path> (REQUIRED)                      Path to a solution file (.sln or .slnx) of a DataMiner protocol or a directory that contains a solution file. Note: In case the specified directory contains multiple solution files, you must specify the file path of a specific solution.
  -od, --output-directory <output-directory> (REQUIRED)                Path to the directory where the validator results should be stored.
  -ofn, --output-file-name <output-file-name>                          Name of the results file. Note: Do not provide an extension, the extension is automatically added based on the results-output-formats option.
  -of, --output-format <HTML|JSON|XML>                                 Specifies the output format. Possible values: JSON, XML, HTML. Specify a space separated list to output multiple formats. [default: JSON|HTML]
  -is, --include-suppressed                                            Specifies whether the suppressed results should also be included in the results.
  -ppxp, --previous-protocol-xml-path <previous-protocol-xml-path>     Path to the previous protocol.xml file.
  -ci, --catalog-id <catalog-id>                                       Catalog ID for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog.
  -cak, --catalog-api-key <catalog-api-key>                            Catalog API key for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog. Can also be set with the environment variable DATAMINER_TOKEN. Required when not providing a previous protocol XML file.
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

Usage:

Options:
  -sp, --solution-path <solution-path> (REQUIRED)                      Path to a solution file (.sln or .slnx) of a DataMiner protocol or a directory that contains a solution file. Note: In case the specified directory contains multiple solution files, you must specify the file path of a specific solution.
  -od, --output-directory <output-directory> (REQUIRED)                Path to the directory where the validator results should be stored.
  -ofn, --output-file-name <output-file-name>                          Name of the results file. Note: Do not provide an extension, the extension is automatically added based on the results-output-formats option.
  -of, --output-format <HTML|JSON|XML>                                 Specifies the output format. Possible values: JSON, XML, HTML. Specify a space separated list to output multiple formats. [default: JSON|HTML]
  -is, --include-suppressed                                            Specifies whether the suppressed results should also be included in the results.
  -ppxp, --previous-protocol-xml-path <previous-protocol-xml-path>     Path to the previous protocol.xml file.
  -ci, --catalog-id <catalog-id>                                       Catalog ID for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog.
  -cak, --catalog-api-key <catalog-api-key>                            Catalog API key for fetching previous protocol version from the Catalog. Can also be set with the environment variable DATAMINER_TOKEN. Required when not providing a previous protocol XML file.
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]

Description:
  Validates a DataMiner solution.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator validate [command] [options]

Options:
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Validates a protocol solution.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Validator validate protocol-solution [options]

Options:
  -sp, --solution-path <solution-path> (REQUIRED)                      Path to a solution file (.sln or .slnx) of a DataMiner protocol or a directory that contains a solution file. Note: In case the specified directory contains multiple solution files, you must specify the file path of a specific solution.
  -od, --output-directory <output-directory> (REQUIRED)                Path to the directory where the validator results should be stored.
  -ofn, --output-file-name <output-file-name>                          Name of the results file. Note: Do not provide an extension, the extension is automatically added based on the results-output-formats option.
  -of, --output-format <HTML|JSON|XML>                                 Specifies the output format. Possible values: JSON, XML, HTML. Specify a space separated list to output multiple formats. [default: JSON|HTML]
  -is, --include-suppressed                                            Specifies whether the suppressed results should also be included in the results.
  -pr, --perform-restore                                               Specifies whether to perform a dotnet restore operation. [default: True]
  -rt, --restore-timeout <restore-timeout>                             Specifies the timeout for the restore operation (in ms). [default: 300000]
  --minimum-log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information [default: Information]
  -?, -h, --help                                                       Show help and usage information
